name: profile activation rejects a P0 severity rule whose only provenance class is pr-corpus and not a tier-1 published standard
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:
  - id: r1
    severity: P0
    provenance:
      - class: pr-corpus
        supporting_prs: [{number: 1, verbatim_quote: x, org: a, tier: 1}]
        evidence_count: 1
        organizations_count: 1
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'P0_requires_published_standard' err.txt && grep -q 'rule=r1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
